calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2022 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice Of Prove Up Hearing For Court Judgment Against Defendant Guild Extracts, Inc.
Off Calendar Aug-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Guild Extracts, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:48 a.m.

Anujan Jeevaprakash, Esq. appeared for plaintiff CannaCraft, Inc.
Dennis Hunter, Custodian of Records for plaintiff CannaCraft, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Jeevaprakash and Hunter appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance as to defendant Guild Extracts, Inc.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Common Counts {Money Had and Received} was filed July 26, 2021, and personally served on defendant Guild Extracts, Inc.'s Authorized Agent on September 15, 2021.
Default as to defendant Guild Extracts, Inc. was entered on Ocrober 22, 2021.
DOE defendants dismissed November 29, 2021.

Plaintiff CannaCraft, Inc. submits the following exhibit for the submit the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Subordinated Convertible Promissory Note dated 04/01/2019..................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff CannaCraft, Inc., and against the defaulted defendant Guild Extracts, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $500,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $76,092.39.
Attorney Fees - $4,273.50.
Costs - $906.00.

Total - $581,271.89.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

Proceedings concluded at 12:09 p.m.
